PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 23, 1997, admitted to probate. Raymond Washington is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-22-2023 Continued To Sep-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Boyes appearing in person for Classie Washington (petitioner).

Mrs. Boyes to clear the issues on the tentative ruling.. Petition for Probate of Will and Letters for Testamentary is continued to September 12, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Svahlin: Not reported.
